_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assess, document, and apply a target's motivation and/or frame of reference to facilitate analysis, targeting and collection opportunities.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.554), AB-T-001 (AB, cosine: 0.523).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.502). Shared vocabulary: [analysis]. DCWF-only terms [apply, assess, collection, document, facilitate, frame] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.865, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Assess, document, and apply a target's motivation and/or frame of reference to f" and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.566 > STS 0.502 (gap +0.064). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [analysis] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [analysis]. DCWF-only: [apply, assess, collection, document, facilitate, frame]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, audience, business, clearly, documentation, non].

signals.detail: STS 0.502 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
